title: OpenExec
description: A CLI-based executive board simulation system. CEO, CFO, CTO, and CMO agents deliberate a decision prompt; each CXO can delegate to a real hierarchical team of sub-agents (financial_analyst, budget_planner, risk_analyst, engineering_lead, solutions_architect, sre, growth_marketer, content_strategist, seo_specialist, chief_of_staff, strategy_associate) before synthesizing a position. Analysis can be grounded in live web search mixed with a local knowledge base at a configurable ratio.
